global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel app with special fares and a discount.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: The background features abstract shapes in a soft purple hue, creating a visually appealing backdrop.

elements.label: NomadLaye logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo reading 'NomadLaye' in large, prominent letters at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Dream text
elements.description: The word 'Dream' is displayed in a clean, modern font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Destinations text
elements.description: The phrase 'destinations await' is presented in a friendly, inviting font, positioned below the 'Dream' text.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge showing '-30%' in a bright yellow color, indicating a discount, located at the bottom left.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Install now' in white text on a purple background, encouraging action at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Special fares text
elements.description: The text 'Special fares today' is displayed in a friendly font, positioned above the call-to-action button.
elements.text_content: destinations await Special fares today 30% Install now

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: An abstract decorative element that adds visual interest, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: A small piece of text reading 'Dream' that adds to the overall theme of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and modern, NomadLaye logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main text in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NomadLaye, Dream, destinations await, Special fares today, -30%, Install now
